title: ferulago brachyloba
intro: Ferulago brachyloba, also known as short-stemmed ferulago or short-bracted ferulago, is a species of plant in the family Apiaceae. It is commonly found in the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ferulago brachyloba include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Ferulago brachyloba is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
